$comment: Machine-readable rename/removal map for @ponchia/ui upgrades (classes, attributes, and tokens). Generated-by-hand from CHANGELOG BREAKING sections; consumed by docs/migrations/*.md and any codemod/sed recipe. 'safe' rules are mechanically rewritable (whole-token, no semantic change); 'manual' rules need human judgement (concept moved or removed, not a 1:1 rename).

migrations.summary: Entire non-ui-* legacy vocabulary removed; everything is now under the .ui-* contract and the check-classes drift gate.

manual.old: hero / project-* / post-card / essay-* / page-* / home-* / signal-panel / worklog-summary
manual.note: Long-form content: .ui-prose / .ui-quote. Cards: .ui-card. Layout: .ui-grid / .ui-stack. Site chrome: the ui-site* shell. No 1:1 mapping — re-compose with the content primitives.
Tone modifiers differ (.ui-alert--info/-success/-warning/-danger); re-pick the tone.
Now scoped to the admin shell vocabulary; standalone stat usage should wrap in .ui-app-metrics.
Compact variant .tag-list--compact → .ui-tags--compact; verify accent-on-accent contrast (see CHANGELOG 0.3.0 a11y fix).

migrations.codemod: See docs/migrations/0.2-to-0.3.md for a ready-to-run ripgrep+sed recipe covering the 'safe' rules.

migrations.summary: Additive colour-system release (ADR-0001); the default dist/bronto.css renders identically. No class or attribute renames. One orphan token pair removed.

manual.new: (removed — re-declare in a consumer :root override if referenced)
manual.note: Orphan token pair: defined in the token mirrors but referenced by no shipped component and documented nowhere, and untiered under the new colour model. Removed under the CONTRIBUTING 'provably-unreferenced surface' exception. If you used it: :root { --orange: #a85f32; --orange-soft: rgb(168 95 50 / 0.13); }

migrations.codemod: No class codemod needed (no renames). See docs/migrations/0.3-to-0.4.md; audit usage with: rg -- '--orange' .

migrations.summary: Adds the analytical-primitives suite (annotations, legend, marks, connectors, spotlight, crosshair, selection + the analytical.css roll-up); all additive/opt-in. Three breaking changes: the chart data key moved out of the report kit into the standalone Legends layer (`.ui-chart__legend`/`.ui-chart__swatch` removed); annotation arrowheads now render via the shared connectors geometry kernel (a small visual path change, no API change); and the marks/bracket-note rationed-accent tone was renamed `evidence`→`accent` to match the annotation/connector tone vocabulary (`.ui-annotation--evidence` stays — it's a marker variant, not a tone).

manual.note: The rationed-accent tone option on the mark/bracket-note recipes is now 'accent' (was 'evidence'), matching ui.connector/ui.annotation. Do NOT rewrite ui.annotation({ variant: 'evidence' }) or the 'evidence' subject marker — those are a marker shape, not a tone, and are unchanged.

Also import '@ponchia/ui/css/legend.css' beside report.css, and wrap each entry's content as
  • … …. The swatch's --chart-color/--chart-pattern inline contract is unchanged; the categorical --chart-N colour is also available via .ui-legend__swatch--N. See docs/legends.md.

No code change needed. The function signature is identical; only the rendered arrowhead path differs slightly now that it shares the connectors geometry kernel. Re-baseline any exact-path SVG snapshot tests of annotation arrowheads.

migrations.codemod: rg -l 'ui-chart__legend|ui-chart__swatch' then s/ui-chart__swatch/ui-legend__swatch/g and rework the ul.ui-chart__legend wrapper into ul.ui-legend with li.ui-legend__item rows. See docs/legends.md.

migrations.summary: Charting realignment. The local static bar-chart renderer (.ui-chart*) is removed — a chart needs scales + data binding, out of scope for the analytical layer. bronto is now a themeable target for Vega-Lite (@ponchia/ui/vega), the same tokens-as-data path as Mermaid/D2. The --chart-* data-viz palette, tokens/charts.json, and the .ui-legend layer are unchanged.

manual.old: ui-chart / ui-chart__plot / ui-chart__bar / ui-chart__label / ui-chart__track / ui-chart__fill / ui-chart__fallback / ui-chart__caption
manual.new: a Vega-Lite chart themed with @ponchia/ui/vega, or a token-themed inline <svg>
manual.note: No 1:1 class mapping — the renderer is removed. For a real chart: import '@ponchia/ui/vega', pass brontoVegaConfig(theme) to vega-embed, and place the result in a <figure class="ui-report__figure"> with a <figcaption class="ui-report__caption"> and a <ul class="ui-legend"> key (see docs/vega.md). For a frozen/print chart: hand-author an inline <svg> using the --chart-N palette tokens for fills. The --chart-value inline knob is gone; --chart-color/--chart-pattern remain on .ui-legend__swatch.

migrations.codemod: No codemod — the .ui-chart* renderer has no replacement class. rg -l 'ui-chart\\b|ui-chart__' to find call sites, then rebuild each as a Vega-Lite chart (@ponchia/ui/vega) or a token-themed inline <svg>. See docs/vega.md.
